titleStmt.title: SII 15.64: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 64. (B.K. No. 101 of 1926-27.) CHINCHILI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall of the Mallikārjuna temple.
This is dated Śaka 1107, Viśvāvasu, [Jyēshṭha] śu. [5], Monday, corresponding to 1185 A.D., May 6, Monday.

It registers a gift of land in the presence of the Fifty-six Mahājanas of the place made by Guṇḍili Jākiyakka, wife of Śrīdhara-daṇḍanāyaka, to the god Mallikārjuna of Svayambhutīrtha at Chinchakshētra in Beḷvala. The recipient of the gift was āchārya Gaṅgarāśī-paṇḍita. It also records a gift of land and a maṭa, made by the Fifty-six Mahājanas to the same temple.
The king is called Chālukya-Nārāyaṇa and is described as the destroyer of the Kalachurya family.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya ku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyanārāyaṇaṁ kaḷacuryyakuḷani
rmmūḷanuṁ vīrasōmēśvaradēvara rājyābhivriddhi pra
varddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire .
Aḷikuḷakuṁtaḷadēśadoḷagaṇa beḷvalake tiḷa
bilameṁduṁ kaḷaśamane kīrttilakṣmiya viḷāsārṇnavada
ṁte sogayikuṁ giritaṭadoḷuṁ . palavuṁ taṭāka
dīrgghige palavuṁ parvvatame palavuṁ naṁdana palavuṁ
Amaḷatīrtta tīrttada keladoḷu śrī mallināthanuda
yisi niṁdaṁ . mecciye ciṁcakṣētrada paścima di
gbhāgadalli gaṁgātīrttakkaścu(cyu)tanuṁ brahmanuṁ bare Urai(ccai)śravavē
ri yiṁdrarājaṁ baṁdaṁ . kaṁ . calada bhujabalada kalitanada
guṇakkādiyenisi heggaḍe ciddaṁ calada bhujabalada kalita
guṇakkādi toḍarddu saṇasuvavoḷaveṁ . vri . dharaṇiyo
ḷu sairaṇeyumaṁ girirājavadoṁdu peṁpumaṁ saradhiya
guṇḍumanupāyda geldu sarōruhōdbhavaṁ nerabava
bhavākritiyī mānavanaṁ paḍediṭṭaneṁbudoppire ta
ḷedaṁ guṇatrayadinārddore śrīdharadaṁḍanāthanoḷu [.]
Antu gaṁḍapracaṁḍamārttaṁḍanenipa śrīdharadaṁḍanā
yakanarddhāṁgalakṣmi ṭeṁṭaḷisuva pātrakke gaṁṭalagāḷaṁ
maccagisuva pātrakke mastakasūlaṁ rāyarāṇirāya
rāyasthāna mukhadarppaṇaṁ Acitaucitayappudiṁda
du parabritadarppadaḷakapāḷacūrṇnasūji
sūjiyeṁba bhrigumathada viṣamapātreda sū
trakaḷaśakke viḷasamenisirdda guṁḍili jākiyakkana peṁpaṁ pēḷvaṁ
[©] . kaṁ . dvitīya sarasvati rūpinoḷatiśayadiṁdaṁ jā
kiyakkana peṁpōṁnatiyēṁ pēḷveṁ dharmmada pathadi
rmmamane biṭṭu nirmmaḷeyādaḷu . va . Aṁtu dvitī
ya lakṣmībhōgabhāginiyappa guṁḍili jākiyakkaṁ yama
niya ma svādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭhāṇa
semādhisīlaseṁpaṁnarappa śrīmadayvataṟuva
yakṣōhiṇiyaṁ koṭṭu sakavarśakāḷātī
ta saṁvatsaraṁ 1107 neya visvāvasu saṁvatsarada
cyiṣṭha suddha 5 sōmavāraṁ byatīphātamuṁ sama
śrī svayaṁbhu tīrttada mallikārjunadēvargge
caitrapavitrakkaṁ nityastiti nivēdyamaṁ naḍavaṁtāga
yalliyācāryya gaṁgarāsi paṁḍitara pādapra
kṣāḷanaṁ māḍi sarvvabādhaparihāramuṁ sarvva na
masyamāgi biṭṭa keyi bagguḍageṟeyiṁ paḍva mu
ve kallūra hebbaṭṭeya sōyikalliṁ baḍaga
lu mūḍalu sokkeyara mahādēvanāya
kara keyiṁ paḍvalu baḍagalu malahageyiṁ
paḍvalu grāmamadhyadiṁ mūḍalu . ha
vagōlu mattelu Āṟu Ā staḷadalli śrī
madayvattaṟuvaru biṭṭa keyi mattalu nālku
sarvva caturasra mattalu 10 mūlasthā
nedēvara baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍalu maṭa Oṁdumaṁ
śrīmadayvattaṟuvaruṁ śva(sva)dharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisu
varu Ī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidātaṁge Acyu
tapadaviyakku . Idanaḷidaṁ śrīvāraṇā
siyaluṁ kurukṣētradaluṁ sāsirvva brā
hmaṇarumaṁ sāyira kapileyumaṁ koṁda paṁca
mahāpātakanakku .
Digital edition of SII 15.64 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
